title: Jaypee Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Jaypee Hospital is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jaypee Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Consultant Physician to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Jaypee Hospital:
Jaypee Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital!
